title: Regroup on Website Refresh Initiative
summary: Michael Donovan shared his frustration with the current WordPress website and detailed his independently developed modern website solution. Joe Furnari insisted Michael Donovan focus on Vinnie's request to update a few pages on the existing site to assess messaging and core concepts. Ultimately, Michael Donovan agreed to send Joe Furnari links to the updated pages before Monday.

decisions.description: Michael Donovan will update only four or five pages of new content on the existing WordPress site, focusing on Vinnie's directive.
Michael Donovan will send links to the updated pages/content to Joe Furnari before Monday.
The new website build will not be shared with Vinnie.

actionItems.task: Send links to the updated pages/content

expectedOutcome.description: Joe Furnari will receive links to two or three updated pages/content before Monday.

actionItems.task: Review the links and pages sent by Michael Donovan and provide feedback.

expectedOutcome.description: Joe Furnari will be prepared to discuss the updated content with Vinnie and provide feedback to Michael Donovan after the Monday staff meeting.

tensions: Michael Donovan's frustration with WordPress and desire to focus on the new website solution.
Joe Furnari's insistence on adhering to Vinnie's request to update the existing site.
Michael Donovan's argument about the technical difficulties of updating the existing site.
Disagreement over whether updating the navigation is necessary and within scope.
referencesToPast: Vinnie's previous acknowledgement that WordPress is not the long-term platform.
Previous scope of work discussions regarding website updates.
Content previously provided by Vinnie for the website.
